title: Space Rally Gets Reality Check With Blue Origin Blowup
summary: A weeks-long rally in space-related stocks came to an abrupt halt on Friday, with the explosion of a Blue Origin rocket serving as a glaring reminder of the risks that come with the potential riches investors hope to reap from the blossoming industry.

title: Pulse of the Street: Falling crude emerges as lone silver lining for bruised equities
summary: Markets ended lower this week as geopolitical uncertainty, monsoon concerns and MSCI-driven flows triggered volatility. However, a sharp fall in crude oil prices is raising hopes of easing macro pressures heading into June.

title: Amazon tells staff to stop using AI just to use AI after shutting down its token leaderboard
summary: Amazon shut down KiroRank, its internal AI token leaderboard, after executives found staff were gaming rankings rather than solving business problems.

title: ICICI Bank, AU Small Finance Bank top picks as banking sector gears up for earnings revival
summary: India's banking sector is poised for a strong earnings rebound. Profit growth is set to recover significantly over the next two years. Private lenders are expected to lead this growth. Deposit competition presents a near-term challenge. Asset quality risks appear manageable. The sector is transitioning to a differentiated growth narrative.

title: Why the stock market has begun to climb the wall of worry
summary: Markets often climb despite worries. In 2020, markets rose before economic recovery became clear. Now, in 2026, a similar pattern emerges amid geopolitical tensions. Investor behavior shows learning, with capital stepping in during fear. While risks remain, markets may have already priced in much of the concern. History shows markets lead sentiment, adjusting prices before certainty arrives.

title: Sebi imposes penalty on Suzlon, executives for misstating financials
summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has fined Suzlon Energy and its top executives ₹29 crore. This action follows allegations of misleading investors by misstating financial statements between FY14 and FY20. Sebi's investigation revealed questionable transactions, including the sale of a business at an inflated price.

title: Sebi drops case against NDTV for disclosure lapse
summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has closed its case against NDTV. This action relates to alleged disclosure failures concerning a 2018 order involving Vishvapradhan Commercial. No penalty was imposed on NDTV. The Securities Appellate Tribunal had previously ruled that VCPL did not gain control of NDTV. This ruling removed the basis for the disclosure requirement.

title: FSIB picks Lavanya Mundayur to head New India Assurance
summary: Lavanya Mundayur, CMD of Agriculture Insurance Company of India, has been recommended by the Financial Services Institutions Bureau (FSIB) to lead New India Assurance Company Limited (NIACL). Mundayur, 57, is set to begin a term of approximately three years, concluding her tenure in May 2029 upon reaching retirement age.

title: CSR norm tweak to boost social stock exchanges
summary: Companies can now allocate up to 10% of their annual CSR spending via zero coupon zero principal instruments from not-for-profit organizations listed on social stock exchanges. This move aims to boost social stock exchanges by attracting more investors and encouraging companies to engage in vetted, outcome-oriented social projects.

title: MSCI index rejig, US-Iran deal worries spook Dalal Street
summary: Indian stock markets experienced a significant drop on Friday, with major indices closing lower. This decline was largely driven by outflows related to MSCI index rebalancing. Despite a tentative ceasefire extension between the US and Iran easing oil prices, market sentiment remained subdued. Foreign investors were net sellers, while domestic institutions provided some support.

title: RBI warns West Asia war may hurt India growth outlook
summary: The central bank said the impact of the conflict is likely to remain contained in the near term but warned that an escalation could derail India's otherwise positive growth trajectory.

title: Reliance Industries gets partial relief from Supreme Court as it sets aside Rs 447 crore Sebi recovery order
summary: In a landmark ruling, the Supreme Court has sided with Reliance Industries Ltd in a trading case that has spanned over 15 years. The court has annulled a substantial disgorgement order previously placed on the company, providing some relief. However, the Rs 25 crore fine levied by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) stands firm.

title: Stocks to buy for long term: Tata Steel, EIL among 5 stocks ICICI Securities' Pankaj Pandey suggests for up to 36% gains
summary: Stocks to buy for long term: ICICI Securities' Pankaj Pandey recommends five quality stocks poised for long-term gains. From Artemis Medicare, EIL to Tata Steel, discover the compelling reasons behind these picks and how they can bolster your investment portfolio in the coming years.

title: Penny stock to be in focus on Monday; here's why
summary: Zee Media Corporation reported a significant financial turnaround for Q4 FY26, with a reduced net loss of  ₹14.32 crore, down from  ₹22.68 crore. The company returned to profitability for the full year, posting a net profit of  ₹16.93 crore, aided by improved revenue and cost management.

title: Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 1 June 2026
summary: Domestic equity benchmarks fell sharply on May 29 due to profit booking and concerns over a US-Iran agreement. The Sensex dropped by 1,092 points to 74,775.74, while Nifty 50 fell by 359 points to 23,547.75, reflecting rising volatility and weakening momentum.

title: What does the future hold for Cyient’s stock?
summary: Over the last few years, Cyient stock has been plagued by revenue growth challenges and margin pressures at the company.

title: If coding becomes automated, then why are we needed at all: Infosys chairman Nandan Nilekani answers
summary: Nilekani's comments come on the back of new rollouts by AI-native firms including Anthropic and OpenAI almost on a bi-weekly basis

title: Peter Thiel not the only billionaire: Buenos Aires to Auckland, ultra-rich are buying their way out of America
summary: Peter Thiel moved to Buenos Aires. A record number of ultra-wealthy individuals are building Plan B lives abroad as US tax pressures and global risks mount

title: Audit, consulting firm employees find access to Cockroach Janta Party site blocked on intranets
summary: As the satirical mock ‘political party’ battles a government takedown order of its social media presence, employees at top audit and consulting firms find the sites of Cockroach Janta Party blocked on their intranets. The block is at the level of the company networks, not by ISPs.

title: Google built the answer to your AI bill before you knew you had a problem
summary: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash rivals frontier AI models at a fraction of the cost, as companies burn through annual token budgets within months of the year starting.&nbsp;

title: How a debt transaction helped lift profit at Reliance Retail in 2025-26
summary: The parent Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd (RRVL) converted  ₹40,000 crore worth of interest-bearing intercorporate loans to its operating company Reliance Retail Ltd (RRL) to a zero-coupon OFCDs, substantially reducing the latter's interest outgo.

title: Man shares  ₹1.3 lakh Europe itinerary covering Spain and Portugal in 13 days, Internet reacts
summary: A travel creator has gone viral after claiming he explored Spain and Portugal over 13 days for just  ₹1.3 lakh. Sharing a detailed cost breakdown and itinerary on Instagram, he argued that Europe can be affordable with careful planning, though several users questioned whether numbers were realistic.

title: Gold, silver prices today, May 30: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: On 30 May, gold prices in India remained stable, with 24-karat gold priced at  ₹156,810 per 10 grams. Silver prices also showed limited movement, with 999 Fine silver at  ₹267,790 per kg.

title: Why AA matters more than stock selection for multi-generational wealth
summary: Stock selection combines art and science, requiring in-depth study of macro and microeconomic factors. For multi-generational wealth, a diversified multi-asset portfolio is essential to manage risk and reduce volatility.

title: 8th Pay Commission: What is 3,490-calorie factor in pay revision? How milk, vegetable prices can decide your next hike
summary: A new '3490 Calorie' system may influence salary hikes for central government employees by linking pay revisions to the cost of essential food items.&nbsp;

title: How can you dispute errors in your credit report? Check out these 5 steps now
summary: Credit report errors can damage your credit score and loan approvals. Follow these five simple steps to dispute inaccuracies, protect your credit profile and improve your financial credibility.

title: EPFO 3.0 to make PF transfers instant—but these 6 mistakes can still derail the process
summary: Small mistakes can delay PF transfers, including incorrect details, multiple UANs, and employer errors. EPFO processing delays also contribute.&nbsp;

title: Buying gold? Here’s why checking the HUID code is crucial even in hallmarked jewellery
summary: Gold jewellery buyers should check the hallmark and HUID code for authenticity and purity. Here's the step-by-step process on how do it and the compensation that can you receive if your jewellery item fails to pass the purity test.

title: ITR-2 vs ITR-1 vs ITR-4: Which income tax return form should you file this year?
summary: The Income Tax Department has launched online filing and Excel utilities for ITR-1, ITR-2, and ITR-4 for AY 2026-27. Taxpayers can file returns for FY 2025-26 starting from May 15, with deadlines varying by form type.

title: Bank holiday today, May 30: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed on Saturday?
summary: All banks in India are open on May 30, 2026, as it is the fifth Saturday. Banks follow the RBI's holiday schedule, closed on the second and fourth Saturdays and Sundays. Online banking remains available on holidays, allowing customers to conduct various transactions without interruption.

title: Concurrent Losers: 14 smallcap stocks decline for 5 consecutive sessions
summary: Amid broader market weakness, the Sensex fell 408 points over five sessions ending May 29, while 14 BSE smallcap stocks declined continuously, losing up to 15% led by Wakefit Innovations, Master Trust and Godavari Biorefineries.

title: NSE extends equity F&O segment timings till 3:40 pm from August
summary: The National Stock Exchange (NSE) will extend equity derivatives trading hours by 10 minutes, with the market now closing at 3:40 pm, effective August 3, 2026. Pre-open and normal market opening times remain unchanged. The volume-weighted average price for closing prices will still be based on the last half-hour of trading.

title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: Learn the secrets of finding alpha & what it takes to build a Rs 100 crore portfolio
summary: Investors and experts are set to gather in Mumbai on June 4 for the ET Alpha Wealth Summit. The event will focus on finding hidden market opportunities and building substantial portfolios. Discussions will cover strategies for consistent excess value and scaling wealth to ₹100 crore. Practical takeaways will guide attendees in navigating complex markets for long-term returns.

title: FPIs remain net sellers for 3rd straight month, offload Rs 32,963 cr worth equities in May: NSDL data
summary: Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) continued their selling streak in Indian equities in May, with net outflows amounting to Rs 32,963 crore during the month, according to data shared by the National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL).

title: Coal India, ONGC, among 10 stocks with highest increase in government holding in Q4. Do you own any?
summary: Despite broader market volatility, rising prices in power, energy and metal stocks boosted the value of Government of India holdings during the March 2026 quarter, led by ONGC, NTPC and Coal India.

title: LIC, HAL, among 10 stocks that saw sharpest decrease in government shareholding in Q4. Check list
summary: Foreign selling, geopolitical tensions and market volatility eroded the value of the Government of India’s holdings in key listed companies during the March 2026 quarter, with LIC, IRFC and HAL leading the sharp declines.

title: Dell's stunning rally: From Trump endorsement to Q1 results - What led to a 101% surge in the US tech stock in 1 month
summary: Dell Technologies reported a remarkable 88% revenue growth in Q1, driven by a 757% increase in AI server sales. Adjusted EPS hit $4.86, exceeding forecasts. The company raised its annual revenue outlook, reflecting robust demand for both AI and traditional computing products.

title: US stock markets this week: S&P 500 posts 9th straight weekly gain as tech stocks power markets to new records
summary: US stock markets closed at record levels amid easing geopolitical tensions and lower oil prices. The S&amp;P 500 marked its fourth consecutive record high, while technology stocks, driven by AI growth, led the rally despite concerns over ongoing Middle East tensions.

title: Airbnb leases 46,000 sq ft for GCC in DLF Cyber City Gurugram
summary: Airbnb will pay a monthly rent of around  ₹61.53 lakh for a five-year tenure, with a 5% rent escalation annually

title: Watch: How a govt employee in Delhi saves  ₹65,000 from a  ₹90,000 salary every month
summary: A 28-year-old government employee from Delhi has gone viral after revealing that she spends only around  ₹25,000 a month despite earning  ₹90,000 in hand. From rent and groceries to fuel and shopping, her budget breakdown has sparked conversations online.

title: I asked ChatGPT to calculate how inflation affects growth of my  ₹50 lakh investment—the answer was a wake-up call
summary: Inflation competes with compounding, affecting future purchasing power. A  ₹50 lakh investment could grow to  ₹4.82 crore in 20 years but would only have the purchasing power of  ₹1.50 crore today with 6% inflation.

title: Hidden home loan charges borrowers must check before signing to avoid higher borrowing costs and financial stress
summary: Hidden home loan charges can quietly increase borrowing costs. Processing fees, stamp duty and insurance add to EMIs and affect long-term affordability, making expert financial advice essential before taking a fresh home loan.

title: Could you be sitting on forgotten money? Here's how to check using the new govt portal
summary: The Finance Ministry launched an online platform for tracking unclaimed financial assets, enhancing public awareness and access to information.&nbsp;
